hooks.command: cd C:\Users\adiqa\Projects\in-common; $log = git log --oneline -5; $status = git status --short; $date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; $content = "Last auto-captured: $date`n`nRecent commits:`n$log`n`nWorking tree:`n$(if ($status) { $status } else { '(clean)' })"; $content | Out-File -FilePath '.claude\session-state.txt' -Encoding utf8

cd C:\Users\adiqa\Projects\in-common; if (Test-Path '.claude\session-state.txt') { $content = Get-Content '.claude\session-state.txt' -Raw; $ctx = "## In Common - Last Session Snapshot`n$content"; $out = [pscustomobject]@{hookSpecificOutput=[pscustomobject]@{hookEventName='SessionStart';additionalContext=$ctx}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5; Write-Output $out }
